content: In a single Workspace script I fetched all products, split references into numeric vs alphanumeric, counted each, and found the biggest numeric gaps - completed end-to-end with no NameError, read-only throughout.

arguments.code:
pb = call('odoo', {'operation':'playbook','name':'records-missing'})
rows = call('odoo', {'model':'product.product','method':'search_read','args':[[], ['default_code']]})
num = [r for r in rows if (r.get('default_code') or '').isdigit()]
print(len(num), len(rows) - len(num))
